Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.spigot.schematic

Class SpigotPasteOperation

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.AbstractPasteOperation
net.apartium.cocoabeans.spigot.schematic.SpigotPasteOperation
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteOperation
@AvailableSince("0.0.46") @NullMarked public class SpigotPasteOperation extends net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.AbstractPasteOperation
SpigotPasteOperation is responsible for pasting schematic blocks into a Spigot world.

This class extends AbstractPasteOperation and provides Spigot-specific block placement logic. It allows customization of placement conditions, block mapping, and post-placement actions.

  • Origin: The world location where the paste operation starts.
  • ShouldPlace: Predicate to determine if a block should be placed.
  • Mapper: Function to map block placements to block data.
  • Placer: Handles the actual block placement in the world.
  • PostPlaceActions: Actions to perform after placing each block.

Usage example: 

   SpigotPasteOperation op = new SpigotPasteOperation(origin, iterator, axisOrder, shouldPlace, mapper, placer);
   op.addPostPlaceAction((block, data) -> { // custom action after placing a block });
Since:
0.0.46

    • SpigotPasteOperation

      public SpigotPasteOperation(org.bukkit.Location origin, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.BlockIterator iterator, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, BiPredicate<org.bukkit.block.Block,net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockPlacement> shouldPlace, Function<net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockPlacement,net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockData> mapper, SpigotSchematicPlacer placer)
      Constructs a new SpigotPasteOperation.
      Parameters:
      origin - The origin location for the paste operation.
      iterator - Iterator for block placements.
      axisOrder - Axis order for iteration.
      shouldPlace - Predicate to determine if a block should be placed.
      mapper - Function to map block placements to block data.
      placer - Handles the actual block placement in the world.
